raw_response:
Voici le résumé des changements depuis `HEAD~1` — **91 fichiers modifiés, 7 ajoutés, 0 supprimés, 133 symboles impactés** :

## Python — Backend API

| Fichier | Symboles modifiés | Type |
|---|---|---|
| `apps/api/ambig/mod1.py` | `create_regular_user`, `process_event` | mod |
| `apps/api/config.py` | `Settings` (class) | mod |
| `apps/api/services/billing.py` | **29 fonctions** : `calculate_invoice`, `validate_invoice_total` (×3), `apply_discount`, `charge_customer`, `refund_payment`, `list_invoices`, `void_invoice` + 20 fonctions `*_billing_internal` (prepare, finalize, audit, notify, enqueue, reconcile, upsert, expand, reduce, snapshot, replay, validate_input, serialize_output, deserialize_input, build_context, emit_metric, rate_limit, retry_with_backoff, batch_process, stream_process) | mod/ajout |
| `apps/api/utils/buggy_pagination.py` | `buggy_paginate` | mod |
| `apps/api/utils/strings.py` | `truncate` | mod |

## TypeScript — API clients (`apps/web/api/`)

5 modules modifiés avec le **même pattern** chacun (7 fonctions + 1 interface) :

- **billing.ts** : `listBilling`, `getBilling`, `createBilling`, `updateBilling`, `deleteBilling`, `bulkBilling`, `searchBilling` + `BillingQuery`
- **members.ts** : idem pattern `*Members` + `MembersQuery`
- **notifications.ts** : idem `*Notifications` + `NotificationsQuery`
- **sessions.ts** : idem `*Sessions` + `SessionsQuery`
- **webhooks.ts** : idem `*Webhooks` + `WebhooksQuery`

## TypeScript — Pages React (`apps/web/app/*/page.tsx`)

**15 pages modifiées**, chacune avec 2 symboles : `*Page` (composant) + `*PageState` (interface) :
> Audit, Billing, Dashboard, ForgotPassword, Invite, Login, Members, Notifications, Pricing, Profile, Reports, Sessions, Settings, Signup, Webhooks

## Shared packages

| Fichier | Symboles | Type |
|---|---|---|
| `apps/web/lib/constants.ts` | `constants`, `constants_default`, `constantsOptions`, `constantsResult` | mod |
| `packages/db/schema.prisma` | `Association`, `Member`, `Invoice` (models) | mod |
| `packages/utils/paginate_copy.py` | `paginate_also` | mod |
| `packages/utils/slug_copy.py` | `slugify` | mod |

## Bench tooling (`bench.py`)

19 fonctions modifiées : `load_tasks_index`, `load_task_prompt`, `load_expected_answer`, `run_claude`, `parse_stream_json`, `extract_files`, `extract_symbols`, `f1`, `_collect_strings_recursive`, `_keyword_match`, `score_response`, `result_path`, `prewarm_run_b`, `run_task`, `_active`, `_turns`, `_chars`, `generate_report`, `main`

## Données (results/raw/)

~58 fichiers JSON `TASK-*-run-B.json` modifiés (pas de symboles indexés).
